item.title: YouTube has now begun skipping videos altogether for users with ad blockers
item.description:
https://www.androidpolice.com/youtube-videos-skip-to-end-if-you-use-an-ad-blocker/
it's easy as wiping your butt. Just copy and paste the link or click the box in the middle where it tells you to click and hit start. it will show up in your downloads folder. no ads, no interruptions, no overlays. just video. at the highest quality. it's also able to get that 'enhanced 1080p' bullshit they're trying to pull. here's the open source https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp for you all you nerds (i envy you) here's the direct link for the GUI for us ignorant folk that need buttons. https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp.exe ezpz lemon fuck your profits.
If you're having trouble with ads or watching videos that you're supposed to be able to in your country, (otherwise you'll need to use a vpn) you can use this nifty little ripper.
item.dc:creator: DietLoki

item.title: Memes vol 291
item.description:
I’d do anything for booty shorts with military secrets on the butt
Be honest
*me pulling up to work in the sluts train car*
If ya nasty
I used to play mancala by myself because I’m an only child
I had a leash as a kid. Here’s the way I see it: if the kid who fell into the gorilla enclosure had been wearing a leash, Harambe would still be here.
“It’s not my fault I have a heavy flow and a wide set vagina!”
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax

Sorry

item.title: Hello world! My egg cracked open!
item.description: Hello world! My egg cracked, and I'm now free! It's lovely to meet you all! So, I'm aware that the waiting list for the gender clinics in the UK are extreme, So I'm wondering if any of you beautiful folk can point me in the direction of alternative sources for T Blockers and E, please feel free to DM me any relevant info! I love you all P.S, for Anyone that likes and wants this pin, I got it from amazon
item.dc:creator: sythenelexia

15. Did Malta do any?! P.S. If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/

item.title: In 1925, Coca Cola released a souvenir keychain in the shape of a swastika. Before the Nazis came along, the swastika symbolized good luck in the United States, as it did in India

item.dc:creator: BCharlotteD

item.title: I can’t believe I did it!
item.description: The left picture isn’t even my heaviest, but this was the last picture I let be taken of me 3 years go, the next year I noticed that I couldn’t get the seatbelt around me in my car, and the smallest hill and I couldn’t breath, and I was making excuses why the plane seatbelt was too small.. that was enough, all my life my weight was up and down but I had a mega life changing event happen, and I guess just sweets/candy was my happy place, even when I quit smoking I didn’t gain weight, over the next year and 2months I did it, I lost 6.7 stone / 93.8 lbs, changed my thinking of food and exercised, no weights or anything like that, just walked a hour a day, used my Apple Watch to make sure I did the steps I wanted and used Apple fitness at home to do the exercises I didn’t wanna do in public, and I did it, I went from a 4-5xl to XL, I’m 5ft11 with rugby build so I’m pleased, I’m starting to see some excess skin wrinkles which is not my jam, so I’m going to stop here, I’m not looking to be skinny skinny, just not so unhealthy and over weight, I slowed down the exercises and I don’t snack etc and the weight has stayed the same, so I think I got this now. for the first time in at least a decade I’m happy with myself, and that’s powerful. Ps that is the exact same tshirt, I don’t know why they are different colours.
item.dc:creator: rainbowdel
